title: Cosmos Reason Dataset Index
description: Index file for a Cosmos Reason v1.0 dataset. Maps each training sample to its conversation file and associated media file.

version.description: Format version - must be 'cosmos-reason-v1.0' for this schema

metadata.description: File metadata for identification and cataloging

license.description: License under which this dataset is distributed

tags.description: List of tags for categorization and search

samples.description: List of training samples, each linking a unique ID to a conversation file and a media file

id.description: Unique identifier for this training sample

conversation.description: Relative path from dataset root to the conversation JSON file (e.g. 'text/sample_001.json')

media.description: Relative path from dataset root to the associated media file (e.g. 'media/video_001.mp4')
